title: The Wonderful Wizard of Oz (chapters I–III)
author: L. Frank Baum
note: Verbatim opening: 'The Cyclone' + 'The Council with the Munchkins' + 'How Dorothy Saved the Scarecrow'. One chapter per spread, paragraph blanks collapsed within each chapter so spread-level reach-word attribution is by chapter. Sits cleanly inside the 5,000–10,000 chapter-band target.
syntaxNote: Syntax bounds (M5) audited, not fully hand-counted: engine segments 288 sentences; all 22 sentences with internal !/? were individually verified as legitimate dialogue-tag merges ('Quick, Dorothy!' she screamed), and chapter starts were spot-checked. Known artifact: the three unterminated chapter headings merge into their first sentence (documented segmentation limitation). Bounds are regression bands around the audited values, sized to absorb small guard-list refinements without hiding real segmentation changes.
